---
title: 'PrivateEye: In-Sensor Privacy Preservation Through Optical Feature Separation'
author:
- Adith Boloor
- Weikai Lin
- Tianrui Ma
- Yu Feng
- Yuhao Zhu
- Xuan Zhang
categories:
- Show All
- Work We Contributed to
topics:
- visual_computing_systems
url_source: https://openaccess.thecvf.com/content/WACV2025/papers/Boloor_PrivateEye_In-Sensor_Privacy_Preservation_Through_Optical_Feature_Separation_WACV_2025_paper.pdf
journ: WACV
year: 2025
contrib: Work We Contributed to
image: featured.png
pub_number: 88
---
